title: Pipeline Turn End Event
description: Payload sent to the pipeline verb's eventHook at the end of each conversational turn. Provides the user transcript, assistant response, and per-component latency metrics for the turn.

transcript.description: The user's final speech-to-text transcript for this turn.

response.description: The assistant's text response for this turn. May be partial if the turn was interrupted.

interrupted.description: True if the user interrupted the assistant before it finished speaking.

latency.description: Latency metrics for this turn, all in milliseconds. Fields are absent when not applicable.

turn_ms.description: Total turn duration from start of user speech through assistant response completion.

response_ms.description: User-perceived response latency: time from end of user speech to first audio played back. This is the headline number most developers care about.

stt_ms.description: Time from start of user speech until the final transcript was received from the STT engine.

llm_ttft_ms.description: LLM time-to-first-token: time from when the LLM was prompted until the first response token arrived.

preflight.description: Early generation (preflight) metrics. Only present when earlyGeneration is enabled.

result.description: Whether the speculative preflight transcript matched the final transcript ('hit'), did not match ('miss'), or was still in progress ('pending').

tokens.description: Number of preflight tokens that were buffered. Only present on a 'hit'.
